allow: Bash(ls -la "C:\\Users\\fysg5\\AppData\\Local\\electron-builder\\Cache\\winCodeSign"" 2>&1 || echo "Directory does not exist yet ")

Bash(npx electron -e "try { const db = require\(''better-sqlite3''\)\('':memory:''\); db.exec\(''CREATE TABLE test \(id INTEGER\)''\); db.close\(\); console.log\(''better-sqlite3 OK for Electron''\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''FAIL:'', e.message\) }")
Bash(gh release view v0.0.5 --repo DevOps-043/PulseHub-SofLIA-releases --json assets --jq '.assets[].name')

Bash(npx electron -e "import\(''electron''\).then\(m => console.log\(''ESM electron keys:'', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,5\).join\('', ''\)\)\).catch\(e => console.log\(''ESM import failed:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(npx electron -e "import\(''electron''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(m\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''default type:'', typeof m.default\); console.log\(''default keys:'', Object.keys\(m.default || {}\).slice\(0,5\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''app in default:'', ''app'' in \(m.default || {}\)\); }\)")

Bash(npx electron --eval "import { createRequire } from ''node:module''; const req = createRequire\(import.meta.url\); const e = req\(''electron''\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof e\); console.log\(''app:'', typeof e.app\); console.log\(''BW:'', typeof e.BrowserWindow\);" --input-type=module)
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%electron%''" get processid,name)
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%node%''" get processid,name,commandline)
